# Task Definition of Done Template

## Acceptance Criteria Checked

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Code Quality

- [ ] Plain-English comments added where useful
- [ ] Docstrings added for public functions/API/MCP tools
- [ ] No unnecessary complexity introduced
- [ ] No imports from `external/reference/`

## Tests

- [ ] Unit tests run
- [ ] Integration tests run
- [ ] Smoke tests run
- [ ] Manual validation documented if tests could not run

## Agent Safety

- [ ] Agent-created records default to proposed where applicable
- [ ] Agent actions logged where applicable
- [ ] Restricted/rejected/superseded records handled correctly

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated if needed
- [ ] API docs updated if needed
- [ ] MCP docs updated if needed
- [ ] Data model docs updated if needed
- [ ] Setup/run commands updated if needed

## Specs and Tasks

- [ ] Spec updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] Plan updated if architecture changed
- [ ] Tasks updated if work changed
- [ ] ADR added or updated if needed

## Review

- [ ] Comment pass complete
- [ ] Peer review complete
- [ ] Critical/High findings fixed or accepted
- [ ] Review report created

## Final Summary

- What changed:
- Tests run:
- Review result:
- Docs/specs updated:
- Remaining risks:
- Commands to run:
